name: Area
description: Affects an area rather than individual targets.

name: Attack
description: An offensive action that involves a power roll against a target.

name: Charge
description: The creature moves and attacks in a single action.

name: Magic
description: The ability is magical in nature.

name: Melee
description: Requires the creature to be adjacent or within reach.

name: Psionic
description: The ability is psionic in nature.

name: Ranged
description: Can target creatures at a distance.

name: Resistance
description: Provides damage resistance or damage reduction.

name: Weapon
description: Uses a physical weapon for the attack.
